message:
feat(provenance): generate real provenance metadata from actual build context

Add BuildContext struct that detects real build environment:
- Detects CI systems: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI, Azure, Jenkins
- Extracts actual VCS commit SHA from CI env or local git
- Extracts actual repository URL from CI env or local git remote
- Uses configured builder_identity with fallback to CI/user detection

The build_registry_seed_request now uses real provenance metadata instead
of hardcoded values, while maintaining fallback behavior for local builds.

Includes test coverage for:
- Local build detection
- GitHub Actions environment detection
- Config override precedence

Closes bd-2bfmi

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
